title: Great Doctrine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Great Doctrine''' or '''True Doctrine''' was the guiding belief of the [[True Way]]. Its exact details are unknown, but it stated that the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] were [[Speciesism|superior to all other life]], and was also their justification for [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invading]] [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''
